scripts.backend:setup: cd backend && npx prisma db push && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.dev:ensure-db: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push --skip-generate
scripts.dev: npm run dev:ensure-db && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev:wait"
scripts.setup: npm run backend:install && npm run frontend:install && npm run backend:setup
